8 #ifndef IDIVKGRADDISCRETEOPERATOR_H
9 #define IDIVKGRADDISCRETEOPERATOR_H
10 
11 #include "IDiscreteOperator.h"
12 #include "arcane/VariableTypedef.h"
13 
14 class IDivKGradDiscreteOperator : public IDiscreteOperator {
15 public:
17  typedef VariableCellReal3x3 AbsolutePermeabilityType;
18 
19 public:
20  virtual ~IDivKGradDiscreteOperator() {}
21  virtual const Integer & status() const = 0;
22 public:
23 
25  virtual bool twoPointBoundary() = 0;
26 
27  // Variables
29  virtual void formDiscreteOperator(const VariableCellReal& k) = 0;
31  virtual void formDiscreteOperator(const VariableCellReal3& k) = 0;
33  virtual void formDiscreteOperator(const VariableCellReal3x3& k) = 0 ;
34 
35  // Shared variables
37  virtual void formDiscreteOperator(const SharedVariableCellReal& k) = 0;
39  virtual void formDiscreteOperator(const SharedVariableCellReal3& k) = 0;
41  virtual void formDiscreteOperator(const SharedVariableCellReal3x3& k) = 0 ;
42 
43 
45  void setNodeDegenerationVariable(VariableNodeInteger & degenerate_nodes)
46  {
47  m_degenerate_nodes = & degenerate_nodes;
48  }
49 
50 protected:
51  VariableNodeInteger * m_degenerate_nodes;
52 };
53 
54 #endif
